title: Yenggugiren Nee En Pakkam Lyrics Dhilip Varman
stanzas: <div>Yenggugiren Nee En Pakkam Lyrics Dhilip Varman

Yengugiren nee
en pakkam illaiye.
urugugiren undhan
yaekkam thollaiye (2)

orunaal unnai naan
ninaithen sirithaen
marunaal unnai naan
ninaithen azhuthen

Yengugiren nee
en pakkam illaiye.
urugugiren undhan
yaekkam thollaiye

un nenjinil oru murai
saaindhu kondaal
maranam yedhada
en kannaa

anbile unnai naan
manadhile sumappene
illaiye ennai naan
mannile pudhaipene

Un kurumbinil ennai
silirkka vaithaai
manam urugida
ennul nulaindhu vittaai

kuzhandhaiyai madimel
saaindhu kondaai
indru kuzhandhai aaginen
un ninaivaal

anbile unai enni
thavippadhu theriyaadha
oru murai orey murai
ennidam varuvaayaa

Yengugiren nee
en pakkam illaiye.
urugugiren undhan
yaekkam thollaiye

orunaal unnai naan
ninaithen sirithaen
marunaal unnai naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of longing and affection, highlighting the emotional turmoil of missing a loved one.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie for this song is currently unknown.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Gowri Arumugam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song is composed by Dhilip Varman.

When was this song released?

This song was released on April 17, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yenggugiren Nee En Pakkam, the listener is taken on an emotional journey of love and longing. The song beautifully conveys the pain of separation and the yearning for a beloved, making it relatable for anyone who has experienced heartbreak. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and deep emotional connection. This track serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of reflection and romantic reminiscence.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yenggugiren Nee En Pakkam is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Gowri Arumugam's soulful voice and Dhilip Varman's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has ever yearned for a loved one. Experience the emotional depth and soothing vibes that make this track a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: I am here, but you are not with me. I am melting away because of your absence.
One day I thought of you and smiled, another day I thought of you and cried.
I am here, but you are not with me. I am melting away because of your absence.
If you touch my heart even once, what is death, my dear?
If I hold you even once, will you become my refuge, my dear?
In love, I cannot keep you in my heart, I cannot forget you in my mind.
You made me smile in your embrace, my heart melts because of you.
You made me laugh like a child, today I have become a child because of your memories.
In love, I cannot forget you, it is a way that cannot be avoided, will you come to me?
I am here, but you are not with me. I am melting away because of your absence.
One day I thought of you and smiled, another day I thought of you and cried.
